name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail zip wallet. Gucci leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud print fabric lining, GG detail, interior: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖GG detail zip wallet. Gucci leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. Model: 308004.
Dimensions: 19.5(W) x 10(H) x 2.5cm(T)
Color: Black/Full Leather.
Made in Italy
